---
title: ""
pagetitle: "Shows — The Hamstrings"
title-block-banner: false
---

```{=html}
<div class="content-page">
  <h1 style="text-align:center; text-transform:uppercase; letter-spacing:0.1em; margin-bottom:2rem;">Shows</h1>
```

::: {.upcoming-shows}
:::

::: {.past-shows}
:::

```{=html}
</div>
```

```{python}
#| echo: false
#| output: asis

import yaml
from datetime import date, datetime

with open("shows.yml") as f:
    shows = yaml.safe_load(f)

today = date.today()

upcoming = []
past = []

for s in shows:
    d = s["date"] if isinstance(s["date"], date) else datetime.strptime(str(s["date"]), "%Y-%m-%d").date()
    s["_date"] = d
    if d >= today:
        upcoming.append(s)
    else:
        past.append(s)

upcoming.sort(key=lambda s: s["_date"])
past.sort(key=lambda s: s["_date"], reverse=True)

def render_show(s):
    d = s["_date"]
    month = d.strftime("%b").upper()
    day = d.strftime("%-d") if hasattr(d, 'strftime') else str(d.day)
    year = d.strftime("%Y")
    venue = s.get("venue", "TBA")
    city = s.get("city", "")
    time = s.get("time", "")
    tickets = s.get("tickets", "")
    note = s.get("note", "")

    html = f'''<div class="show-card">
  <div class="show-date">
    <div class="month">{month}</div>
    <div class="day">{d.day}</div>
    <div class="year">{year}</div>
  </div>
  <div class="show-details">
    <h3>{venue}</h3>
    <p class="venue-info">{city}</p>'''
    if time:
        html += f'\n    <p class="show-time">{time}</p>'
    if note:
        html += f'\n    <p class="show-time">{note}</p>'
    html += '\n  </div>'
    if tickets:
        html += f'\n  <div class="show-tickets"><a href="{tickets}">Tickets</a></div>'
    html += '\n</div>'
    return html

if upcoming:
    print('<div class="upcoming-section"><h2>Upcoming</h2>')
    for s in upcoming:
        print(render_show(s))
    print('</div>')
else:
    print('<div class="upcoming-section"><h2>Upcoming</h2>')
    print('<p style="text-align:center; color: rgba(255,255,255,0.5);">More shows coming soon… check back!</p>')
    print('</div>')

if past:
    print('<div class="past-shows"><h2>Past Shows</h2>')
    for s in past:
        print(render_show(s))
    print('</div>')
```
